blocks.body: Past Perfect Continuous: Negatives — had not / hadn't been + V-ing for actions that were not continuing up to another past action or past moment.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"In negative Past Perfect Continuous, we use had not been + V-ing or the short form hadn't been + V-ing.","rules":[{"label":"had not been / hadn't been + V-ing","color":"emerald","text":"This is the basic negative model for all subjects.","example":"I had not been sleeping. / She hadn't been working."},{"label":"Not continuing before then","color":"blue","text":"The negative shows that the process was not continuing before another event or moment in the past.","example":"They hadn't been waiting long before the bus came."},{"label":"No duration up to that point","color":"amber","text":"These sentences often help say that there was little or no duration before that point.","example":"He hadn't been working there long when he got the offer."}]}

{"title":"1. Basic negative formula","intro":"Remember the two common negative forms of Past Perfect Continuous.","items":[{"label":"Full form","title":"had not been + V-ing","subtitle":"I had not been sleeping well."},{"label":"Short form","title":"hadn't been + V-ing","subtitle":"She hadn't been studying long."},{"label":"All subjects","title":"hadn't been works with everyone","subtitle":"I hadn't been / he hadn't been / they hadn't been"},{"label":"Meaning","title":"not continuing / not for that long","subtitle":"The process was not continuing up to that moment or did not last that long."}]}

{"title":"2. Where negatives are useful","sections":[{"label":"The process was not continuing","color":"emerald","description":"Show that the action was not in progress before another event in the past.","examples":[{"en":"She hadn't been reading before I came in.","ua":"The process was not happening then."},{"en":"We hadn't been talking when the teacher arrived.","ua":"There was no ongoing process at that moment."}]},{"label":"Not for long before then","color":"blue","description":"Say that the process had been short or almost absent before a past point.","examples":[{"en":"They hadn't been waiting long before the doors opened.","ua":"The duration was short."},{"en":"He hadn't been working there long when he got the offer.","ua":"The earlier duration was limited."}]},{"label":"Past reason","color":"amber","description":"The negative can show that an earlier process was not the reason for the later state.","examples":[{"en":"He was not tired because he hadn't been running.","ua":"The missing earlier process explains the state."},{"en":"The floor was dry because it hadn't been raining.","ua":"No earlier process means no wet result."}]},{"label":"Expectation and background","color":"violet","description":"Sometimes it matters to say that an expected process had not been happening.","examples":[{"en":"The children were calm because they hadn't been playing outside.","ua":"The earlier background process was missing."},{"en":"The room was quiet because people hadn't been talking.","ua":"No ongoing action explains the situation."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Common patterns","intro":"See where not stands in Past Perfect Continuous.","rows":[{"en":"I had not been sleeping well before the trip.","ua":"had not been sleeping","note":"full form"},{"en":"She hadn't been working there long.","ua":"hadn't been working","note":"short form"},{"en":"They hadn't been waiting long before the bus arrived.","ua":"hadn't been waiting","note":"short duration"},{"en":"It hadn't been raining, so the road was dry.","ua":"hadn't been raining","note":"no earlier process"}],"warning":"After hadn't been, you still need V-ing, not V1 or V3."}

{"title":"4. Short summary","items":["Negative Past Perfect Continuous = had not been + V-ing or hadn't been + V-ing.","The form hadn't been is the same for all subjects.","These sentences show that a process was not continuing up to another past action or past moment.","After hadn't been, always use the verb with -ing."]}

{"title":"Past Perfect Continuous lessons","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/en/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-forms","current":false},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/en/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-negatives","current":true},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/en/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-questions","current":false},{"label":"Time Expressions","url":"/en/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-time-expressions","current":false}]}
